MaintenanceRecord.title: MaintenanceRecord
MaintenanceRecord.description: Represents a facility maintenance, repair or purchase record at Meridian Heights International School.

id.description: The unique ID of the record.

date.description: The date when the maintenance was done.

department.description: The department where the work was done.

subject.description: The specific item or subject of maintenance.

details.description: Details of the maintenance or repairs done or purchase done.

whoDidIt.description: Who performed the maintenance or purchase.

role.description: Role of the person who logged it.

proofName.description: Name of the uploaded proof file.

proofType.description: Type of the uploaded proof file.

proofData.description: Base64 data or url of the proof file.

maintenance_records/{recordId}.description: Collection of all school maintenance records.
